$meta.focus: Crowd Control, Energy Drain, Chained Damage
$meta.formula: dmg = base * MP/100 * (1 + EP/100); effect chances scale (MP+EP)/100
$meta.desc_note: VERBATIM game data (0.9.4.x). NOTE: game data lists 14 Electromancy skills; this file has 12 — two skills (Static Field energy-burn passive; every-3rd-spell Resonance passive) pending official names.

skills.desc: 7 Shock Damage; 70% chance applies 'Resonance' 8 turns (-10% Move Res, -10% Control Res, -10% Shock Res). Vs Resonating target: +30% damage and prolongs Resonance 2 turns.
skills.dyn:
Shoots a bolt of electricity, dealing {8*(1+(ELE-100)/100)*MP/100} Shock Damage (Spell Accuracy +10%).

Hitting the target with {35*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance knocks it back and with {70*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance applies it with "Resonance" for 8 turns:
-20% Shock Resistance
-7.5% Move Resistance
-5% Control Resistance
+10% Cooldowns Duration

If the target is affected by "Impulse", prolongs its duration by 6 turns without applying "Resonance".

skills.desc: 3x3 field around caster 6 turns: enemies inside get -15% Move Res, 30% chance/turn of 3 Shock Damage; Resonating enemies take +50%. Moves with caster.
skills.dyn:
Applies all Resonating targets within Vision with "Static Field" for 6 turns, creating a 3х3 tile area around each of them.

Remaining in the spell's area of effect:
Deals {3*(1+(ELE-100)/100)*MP/100} Shock Damage
Applies with -4% Shock Resistance for 10 turns (the effect stacks up to 5 times)
Has {7*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance to cause Immobilization.

"Static Field" doesn't affect the caster and deals double damage to Immobilized targets.

skills.desc: Grants +0.1% Magic Power for each remaining percent of Max Energy and +0.1% Energy Restoration for each missing percent.
skills.dyn:
Using the ability tree's spells grants strikes and shots {WIL*0.2*(1+(ELE-100)/100)} Shock Damage for 4 turns.

The effect doesn't stack.

While this effect is active, strikes and shots apply their targets with -0.5% Shock Resistance for each learned Electromancy ability for 6 turns.

The effect stacks up to 5 times.

skills.desc: 8 Shock Damage to all adjacent, 100% knockback 2 tiles (+1 vs Resonating); 50% chance Staggers and reduces tree cooldowns by 2 per affected target. Doesn't affect same target twice.
skills.dyn:
Deals {12*(1+(ELE-100)/100)*MP/100} Shock Damage to all adjacent tiles. With {40*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance knocks the affected targets back or with {100*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance Staggers them if the knockback fails.

With {85*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance applies all affected targets with "Impulse" for 8 turns:
-25% Shock Resistance
-15% Move Resistance
-10% Control Resistance
+20% Cooldowns Duration
Deals {2*(1+(ELE-100)/100)*MP/100} Shock Damage
Has {15*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance to knock back from the caster.

If the target is affected by "Resonance", transforms it into "Impulse", inheriting most of the remaining duration. Targets with "Impulse" are treated as Resonating by the ability tree's spells.

skills.desc: Tree spells apply -10% Shock Resistance 6 turns per Resonating target within Vision (stacks up to 3).
skills.dyn:
Deals {8*(1+(ELE-100)/100)*MP/100} Shock Damage to all Resonating targets within Vision and with {40*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance Dazes them.

The spell's damage increases by 25% for each Resonating target within Vision.

If Resonating targets are adjacent to each other, the spell deals double damage to them.

skills.desc:
Lightning strikes within Vision grant +10% Electromantic Power for 1200 turns.

The effect doesn't stack.
Ball lightning 4 turns (+1 per Resonating enemy in Vision): each turn 4 Shock Damage to all within 2 tiles, 25% Resonance. Slowly drifts toward nearest enemy.
skills.dyn:
Creates a ball lightning on the targeted tile, which persists for 4 turns (+1 turn for each Resonating enemy within Vision).

Each turn the ball lightning deals {4*(1+(ELE-100)/100)*MP/100} Shock Damage to all targets within 2 tiles and with {14*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance pulls them closer.

The ball lightning deals 25% more damage to adjacent targets and 200% of its damage when targets are pulled or knocked back into it.

skills.desc: Casting tree spells: 75% chance applies Resonance 3 turns to a random non-Resonating enemy in Vision; otherwise prolongs Resonance/Impulse on a random Resonating target by 3 turns.
skills.dyn:
Increases the damage dealt by "Impulse" by 100% for each Resonating enemy within Vision.

If "Impulse" successfully knocks a target back, with {50*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance also Immobilizes it.

skills.desc: 'Tempest' 6 turns: your strikes and shots deal bonus Shock Damage (scales with WIL), +10% Cooldowns reduction on Shock kills, Resonance procs on struck targets.
skills.dyn:
Deals {12*(1+(ELE-100)/100)*MP/100} Shock Damage to the target and two random enemies within Vision, prioritizing the ones affected by "Resonance".

Removes "Resonance" from the affected targets and with {20+(MP+ELE)/200}% chance Stuns them.

Each turn of removed "Resonance" increases the damage and the Stun Chance by 5%.

If the spell Stuns the target, summons an additional lightning against a random enemy within Vision.

Instantly kills the target if the spell puts its Health below 16% (but no more than {20*(MP+ELE)/200}).

skills.desc: 12 Shock Damage to target and two random enemies in Vision (prioritizes Resonating). Removes Resonance; 20% + (MP+EP)/100% Stun chance, +5% damage and Stun per removed Resonance turn. On Stun: extra lightning vs random enemy.
skills.dyn:
Deals {10*(1+(ELE-100)/100)*MP/100} Shock Damage and with {80*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance applies the target with "Resonance" for 4 turns.

Then jumps to all Resonating targets within 8 tiles, starting with the closest ones, dealing damage and prolonging the duration of "Resonance" by 3 turns.

With {50*(MP+ELE)/200}% chance Staggers all affected targets and reduces the ability tree's cooldowns by 2 for each affected target.

The spell doesn't affect the same target twice.

skills.desc: Grants +0.1% Magic Power for each remaining percent of Max Energy and +0.1% Energy Restoration for each missing percent.

Grants +3% Miracle Chance for each Resonating target within Vision.

Killing enemies with the ability tree's spells grants -5% Spells Energy Cost and -5% Cooldowns Duration for 8 turns for each Resonating target within Vision.
